news.t: AllianceBernstein Enhances ETF Offerings with Two New Fixed Income Conversions

overview.description: The AB Core Bond ETF (CORB) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in broad credit fixed income. The fund actively manages a diverse global bond portfolio, targeting a duration of 3.5  7 years. The fund aims for an investment grade portfolio but may allocate up to 25% in high yields CORB was launched on Nov 10, 2025 and is issued by AB Funds.

data.title: AllianceBernstein Enhances ETF Offerings with Two New Fixed Income Conversions
data.text: NASHVILLE, Tenn. , Nov. 10, 2025 /PRNewswire/ -- AllianceBernstein Holding L.P.
